title: chrysanthemum abrotanifolium
intro: Chrysanthemum abrotanifolium, also known as golden chrysanthemum or pot marigold, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. Chrysanthemum abrotanifolium is believed to have numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, improving digestion, and relieving respiratory problems. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
